matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Lunch > Turkey Sandwich — Garden Veg Combo

node.name: Turkey Sandwich — Garden Veg Combo
node.short_description: A lean turkey sandwich on whole-grain bread with lettuce, tomato, and mustard—protein-rich, fiber-forward, veggie-packed.
node.meal_suggestion: Great grab-and-go lunch; pair with a fruit (apple/banana) and a glass of water for a balanced meal.
node.nutrition_note: Lean protein from turkey + fiber from whole-grain bread; adds veggies (lettuce, tomato) for vitamins and fullness; mustard adds flavor with minimal fat; monitor sodium if using processed turkey or condiments.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 5 > Lunch > Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Set

node.name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Set
node.short_description: Caprese-inspired sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic.
node.meal_suggestion: Enjoy with a side salad or fruit; drizzle a teaspoon of olive oil for healthy fats if desired; keep portion size moderate to fit a balanced meal.
node.nutrition_note: Balanced meal with protein from mozzarella and fiber from whole-grain bread; tomato and basil provide vitamins and antioxidants; balsamic adds flavor with minimal calories; moderate sodium from cheese. For lower fat, use part-skim mozzarella.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 7 > Lunch > Soba Noodle Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Wrap

node.name: Soba Noodle Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Wrap
node.short_description: Light soba noodle bowl with crisp vegetables, protein-rich egg, and a sesame-ginger dressing.
node.meal_suggestion: A balanced soba noodle bowl with cucumber, carrot, and egg, dressed in sesame-ginger dressing; can also be enjoyed wrapped in a tortilla for a wrap option.
node.nutrition_note: Balanced: egg provides high-quality protein; soba offers carbohydrates; cucumber and carrot add fiber and micronutrients; sesame dressing contributes healthy fats. If soba is not gluten-free, the dish contains gluten; use 100% buckwheat soba for a gluten-free option. Expect moderate sodium from the dressing.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 7 > Lunch > Black Bean Wrap — Smoky Bake

node.name: Black Bean Wrap — Smoky Bake
node.short_description: Smoky black bean wrap with avocado, lettuce, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla—fiber-rich, plant-based, and satisfying.
node.meal_suggestion: Toast the wrap for extra crispness and heat the filling until beans are warm. To boost protein, add extra black beans or sprinkle hemp seeds; for more smokiness, dust with smoked paprika or chipotle powder. Pair with a side of fruit or raw veggies to round out the meal.
node.nutrition_note: Good source of plant-based protein and fiber from black beans, plus healthy fats from avocado. Includes greens and whole grains for satiety; be mindful of sodium in store-bought salsa and wraps—opt for lower-sodium options if needed.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 5 > Lunch > Teriyaki Chicken Bowl — Garden Veg Style

node.name: Teriyaki Chicken Bowl — Garden Veg Style
node.short_description: Teriyaki chicken bowl with garden vegetables over rice — a protein-rich, veggie-forward meal.
node.meal_suggestion: A quick, balanced bowl of lean chicken, rice, and mixed vegetables coated in teriyaki glaze. For a lighter version, swap in brown rice and low-sodium sauce to increase fiber and lower sodium.
node.nutrition_note: Protein from chicken; carbohydrates from rice; fiber and micronutrients from mixed vegetables; teriyaki sauce adds flavor but can be high in sodium; to boost fiber and reduce sodium, use brown rice and/or a reduced-sodium sauce and add more vegetables as desired.
